channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: US Federal Officials Urge Telecom Companies to Boost Security with Encrypted Messaging Apps
item.description: Federal officials call on telecom companies to use encrypted messaging apps following a massive Chinese hacking campaign against U.S. firms, highlighting the need for enhanced security measures in the wake of unprecedented cyberattacks.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: President-elect Trump Nominates Paul Atkins as SEC Chair
item.description: President-elect Trump nominates former SEC commissioner Paul Atkins to lead the independent agency, signaling a shift towards a more friendly approach to the cryptocurrency industry.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
